title: T-035 — UI: PLN-002 PO List page (parity with plan_po_list)
prompt:
Build PLN-002 PO List at `src/app/(planning)/planning/purchase-orders/page.tsx` matching prototype `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/po-screens.jsx:3-139` 1:1.

Features: filterable table (status badge from rule registry display config, supplier, total, expected delivery), search, status filter, supplier filter, date filter, sort by columns, pagination. Status badges colored per planning_settings.status_display.po (T-029 seed).

Server Component reads list via getPurchaseOrders(filters). RED RTL test asserts table columns + filter controls match prototype.

pipeline_inputs.description: PO list page server-rendered with filters + status badges driven by status_display config.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/po-screens.jsx:3-139. Status badge component reads color/label from planning_settings.status_display.po keyed by status string. Use shadcn DataTable + @tanstack/react-table. Server-side pagination + filtering via Drizzle. Parity checklist: (1) header row labels and order, (2) toolbar filter controls (search input, status select, date range), (3) status badge variants and colors driven by config, (4) row action menu items.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/po-screens.jsx:3-139`, then the production component has the same column order, same toolbar filters, same status badge primitive, and same action menu items — parity verified by RTL snapshot per the checklist in `pipeline_inputs.details`.
Given a status_display.po.confirmed.color override in settings, when a confirmed PO renders, then its badge uses the override color.
Given the filter 'status=draft' is selected, when the URL updates, then only draft POs render and pagination is preserved.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/po/__tests__/POTable.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL snapshot for column + toolbar parity, badge color test using mocked status_display.
Playwright e2e: filter by status=draft, expect only draft rows.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not hard-code badge colors — must read from status_display config.
Do not skip RBAC: planning.po.view required.
